title: Andriy`s Aditions
description: A mod for survive in a desert and adds a copple of things!
body:
With this mod you can survive in desert, and there is a copple more things! But there no relise, so there can be bugs, i promise - i try fix it! 
Spoilers!!!!
Tha main item in the mod - is pestle and bowl - this item can crush items in crafting grid. Cactus bowl - this new item can pick cactus juice then he`s crushed. Chocolade - who`s doesn`t likes chokolade? And it`s grands speed! And there is a new crafts you can explore with jei!
